title: Mailchimp brand assets
summary: Controlled asset distribution and usage guidance as part of brand operations.
lessons: Assets require owner, rights, version, allowed channels and expiry.
caveats: Public availability is not permission for unrestricted reuse.
licenseNote: Trademarked/proprietary assets; follow the portal's current usage terms.
antiImitationNote: Do not reuse Freddie, palette, typography or illustrations.
